issues_found.issue: @apollo/client installed with 'latest' tag - could lead to unstable builds
Some dependencies may be outdated (openai: ^6.22.0, vite: ^6.1.0, react: ^18.3.0) - check for security patches

security_concerns.issue: ADMIN_SECRET_KEY has a default placeholder value 'change_this_to_something_secure' - users must change this

env_issues.issue: .env file is missing - required for runtime configuration
Required variables: OPENAI_API_KEY, PERPLEXITY_API_KEY, NODE_ID, SWARM_PORT, ADMIN_SECRET_KEY

quick_fixes: Replace placeholder values in .env with real API keys
Change ADMIN_SECRET_KEY to a strong, unique value
Consider pinning @apollo/client to a specific version in package.json instead of using 'latest'
Run 'npm audit fix' to check for known vulnerabilities
